## Checklist

- [ ] No Ghost exports, member data, database dumps, site archives, or credentials are included.
- [ ] Migration changes support dry runs and safe reruns.
- [ ] URL, canonical, redirect, media, and SEO effects are documented.
- [ ] Visible frontend changes include a screenshot.
- [ ] Deployment and rollback considerations are documented.
